rules.title: Network IOC Detection [25a3f6600d81]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [25a3f6600d81]
id: cdb-net-25a3f6600d81
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 2 malicious IPs and 2 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-06-09
modified: 2026-06-09
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '16.03.53.12'
            - '15.03.05.19'
        DestinationHostname|contains:
            - 'java.net'
            - 'rsync.samba.org'
    condition: selection
level: medium
falsepositives:
    - Shared hosting infrastructure
    - CDN/cloud provider IP overlap
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://cyberdudebivash.com/threat-intel
source_advisories: CVE-2026-11493: A weakness has been identified in Tenda AC15 15.03.05.19. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /etc_r
Netty has an IPv6 Subnet Filter Bypass via Incorrect Comparator Masking
CVE-2026-11504: A vulnerability was detected in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. The impacted element is the function setSchedWifi of the file /
rsync 3.4.4 released, regression fixes

rules.title: File Hash Detection [25a3f6600d81]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Malicious File Hash Detection [25a3f6600d81]
id: cdb-hash-25a3f6600d81
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 2 malicious file hashes
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-06-09
tags:
    - attack.execution
    - attack.t1204
    - attack.defense_evasion
logsource:
    category: file_event
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        Hashes|contains:
            - '68e6ab3fdfc71a328b1966bad5c6aba0f7d0c2e1'
            - '40f2cc32279f0f8a51016c3c6870a2c0c808e6c0'
    condition: selection
level: critical
falsepositives:
    - Hash collision (negligible probability)
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
source_advisories: CVE-2026-11500: A vulnerability was identified in Weaviate up to 1.37.7. This vulnerability affects the function validateConfig of the f
Authlib OAuth 2.0 has Open Redirect in Authorization API that allows attacker-controlled redirect_uri through unsupported response_type

rules.title: Network Intel YARA [25a3f6600d81]
rules.content:
rule CDB_SENTINEL_Network_Intel_25a3f6600d81
{
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51"
        description = "Detects network IOCs from threat intelligence feeds"
        date = "2026-06-09"
        severity = "high"
        reference = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        batch_id = "25a3f6600d81"
        ioc_count = 4

    strings:
        $ip_0 = "16.03.53.12" ascii wide nocase
        $ip_1 = "15.03.05.19" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_2 = "java.net" ascii wide nocase
        $dom_3 = "rsync.samba.org" ascii wide nocase

    condition:
        filesize < 100MB and any of them
}
source_advisories: CVE-2026-11493: A weakness has been identified in Tenda AC15 15.03.05.19. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /etc_r
Netty has an IPv6 Subnet Filter Bypass via Incorrect Comparator Masking
CVE-2026-11504: A vulnerability was detected in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. The impacted element is the function setSchedWifi of the file /
rsync 3.4.4 released, regression fixes

rules.title: Suricata Threat Intel [25a3f6600d81]
rules.content:
# CDB SENTINEL APEX v51 - Auto-Generated Suricata Rules
# Batch: 25a3f6600d81 | Generated: 2026-06-09
# IOC Count: 25
# Source: https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com

alert ip any any -> 16.03.53.12 any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel IP: 16.03.53.12"; sid:9157018; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-09, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert ip any any -> 15.03.05.19 any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel IP: 15.03.05.19"; sid:9157019; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-09, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert dns any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel Domain: java.net"; dns.query; content:"java.net"; nocase; sid:9158018; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-09, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert dns any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel Domain: rsync.samba.org"; dns.query; content:"rsync.samba.org"; nocase; sid:9158019; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-09, severity high, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
alert http any any -> any any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL v51 - Threat Intel URL"; http.uri; content:""; nocase; sid:9159018; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; metadata:created_at 2026-06-09, source CDB_SENTINEL_APEX_v51;)
